items.title: Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule
items.originalTitle: Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule
items.headlineZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.summary: The NBA will test the one free throw rule during July's summer leagues in Northern California, Salt Lake City and Las Vegas. The one free throw rule has been used by the G League since 2019-20 to improve the game flow. The one free throw rule awards one free throw for any foul that would result in one, two, or three free throws. The free throw attempt is worth the same number of points as the free throws it replaces. Game switch back to the standard free throw rule when under two minutes and for overtime. The NBA will also test an embedded ball with a sensor that detects contact with the ball for the summer leagues.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 Summer League To 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: Summer League To 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Summer League To Test One Free Throw Rule

items.title: Luka Doncic 'Excited' For Lakers' Free Agency Moves
items.originalTitle: Luka Doncic 'Excited' For Lakers' Free Agency Moves
items.headlineZh: Luka Doncic 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Luka Doncic 签约动向更新
items.summary: Luka Doncic is pleased with the Los Angeles Lakers' offseason additions after the team re-signed backcourt co-star Austin Reaves and added center Walker Kessler. The sources told The Athletic that Doncic was "excited" by the moves that addressed two of his top roster priorities this summer. Despite Doncic spending the summer in Europe, the Lakers maintained regular contact with the star guard and his representatives throughout the process. The Lakers are not yet finished building its roster as they are targeting wing depth, with Jonathan Kuminga among the names on their list. A source close to Doncic told ESPN in June that the Lakers had promised a significant offseason in 2026, "Luka wants to be a championship team yesterday," the source told ESPN. "Ever since the trade, they've always told us: 'summer of '26. We'll show you in the summer of '26.' So, we are so excited that the summer of '26 is here." Doncic relayed one central request to Lakers executives Rob Pelinka and JJ Redick this offseason, echoing a demand he first made 16 months ago upon joining the franchise. "Luka's first and foremost desire is an A-list center," a source said.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，Luka Doncic 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Luka Doncic 签约动向更新

items.title: Tari Eason, Rockets Agree To Five-Year, $81.5M Deal
items.originalTitle: Tari Eason, Rockets Agree To Five-Year, $81.5M Deal
items.headlineZh: Tari Eason 与火箭达成五年，8150 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Tari Eason 与火箭达成五年，8150 万美元合同
items.summary: Tari Eason has agreed to re-sign with the Houston Rockets on a five-year, $81.5 million contract, reports Shams Charania of ESPN . Eason was a restricted free agent after he was unable to agree to terms on a contract extension before the start of the season. Eason's contract includes a player option in Year 5 and a 10 percent trade kicker, according to The Athletic . Eason was the 17th overall pick in the 2022 NBA draft out of LSU and is one of the NBA's better perimeter defenders. In 60 games last season, Eason averaged 10.4 points, 6.3 rebounds and 1.5 assists in 25.8 minutes. Eason shot 35.8 percent on three-pointers. Eason is represented by Thaddeus Foucher and Chafie Fields .
items.dekZh: 在60场 上赛季，Eason 场均10.4分，6.3篮板和1.5助攻，出场25.8分钟。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Tari Eason 与火箭达成五年，8150 万美元合同，原文关注 Tari Eason 的合同或自由市场动向。

items.title: Kenrich Williams, Thunder Agree To One-Year, $5M Deal
items.originalTitle: Kenrich Williams, Thunder Agree To One-Year, $5M Deal
items.headlineZh: Kenrich Williams 与雷霆达成一年，500 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Kenrich Williams 与雷霆达成一年，500 万美元合同
items.summary: Kenrich Williams and the Oklahoma City Thunder have agreed upon a one-year, $5 million deal. The Thunder previously declined their $7.2 million option on Williams for the 2026-27 season. Williams appeared in 56 games with the Thunder last season, averaging 6.5 points, 3.3 rebounds and 1.4 assists in 15.4 minutes. Williams, who is represented by Adam Pensack , was acquired by the Thunder from the New Orleans Pelicans in a trade during the 2020 offseason as part of the Steven Adams deal.

items.headlineZh: Tyus Jones 与掘金达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Tyus Jones 与掘金达成一年合同
items.summary: Tyus Jones has agreed to re-sign with the Denver Nuggets on a one-year deal. Jones appeared in 48 games last season with the Orlando Magic before he was traded to the Dallas Mavericks and was eventually waived. Jones appeared in 11 regular season games with the Nuggets, averaging 2.2 points, 1.3 rebounds and 1.2 assists in 8.3 minutes. Jones will continue to give the Nuggets backup minutes at point guard as he plays his age-30 season.

items.title: Billy Donovan Hired As Top Assistant Coach Of Spurs
items.originalTitle: Billy Donovan Hired As Top Assistant Coach Of Spurs
items.headlineZh: Billy Donovan Hired 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Billy Donovan Hired 相关消息更新
items.summary: Billy Donovan has agreed to become the lead assistant coach for the San Antonio Spurs under Mitch Johnson. Donovan will replace Sean Sweeney, who was hired as head coach of the Orlando Magic. Donovan chose to exit the Chicago Bulls as they enter into a rebuild. Donovan was a candidate for the Magic job that went to Sweeney. Before the Bulls' tenure, Donovan was head coach of the Oklahoma City Thunder and spent one season coaching Shai Gilgeous-Alexander. The Spurs are coming off an appearance in the NBA Finals, losing to the New York Knicks in five games.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 Billy Donovan Hired 的最新动态和后续影响。

Anderson split time last season with the Utah Jazz, Memphis Grizzlies and Minnesota Timberwolves, appearing in 43 games and averaging 6.2 points, 3.5 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 19.8 minutes. items.title: Celtics Negotiated With Giannis Antetokounmpo For Extension At Less Than Full Max
items.originalTitle: Celtics Negotiated With Giannis Antetokounmpo For Extension At Less Than Full Max
items.headlineZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新
items.summary: The Boston Celtics were close enough to a trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo where they held discussions with his camp on what his extension with the franchise would look like. While Antetokounmpo is eligible for an extension worth up to $275 million over four years, the Celtics hoped to sign him to a two-year extension at 30 percent of the cap. Antetokounmpo was seeking a three-year extension at 35 percent of the cap. Antetokounmpo was eventually traded by the Milwaukee Bucks to the Miami Heat instead of the Celtics. There have not been any indications on what type of contract extension he will ultimately sign with the Heat. Antetokounmpo will become eligible to officially sign an extension with the Heat in January. "The Giannis to Boston thing was closer than I think people realize," said Bill Simmons. "I still don't think Hugo [Gonzalez] was ever in the trade. "But I do think it got to the point that Bucks had an arrangement with Giannis that-they weren't going to trade him without him signing off on it. And he didn't sign off on the Miami trade for a couple days there. And they were talking about extensions with the Celtics. And it came down to two years and 30 percent of the cap, or three years for 35. The Celtics were pretty entrenched at two for 30. And Giannis wanted the three for 35 and they couldn't agree on it. "And that was when he green-lit the Miami trade and Miami threw in [Kasparas] Jakucionis. And that's when it happened."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Negotiated With Giannis 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Negotiated With Giannis 签约动向更新

items.title: Celtics Not Motivated By Money Or Follow-Up Trade In Dealing Jaylen Brown
items.originalTitle: Celtics Not Motivated By Money Or Follow-Up Trade In Dealing Jaylen Brown
items.headlineZh: Jaylen Brown 与 76 人达成 6 年 合同
items.titleZh: Jaylen Brown 与 76 人达成 6 年 合同
items.summary: The Boston Celtics' blockbuster trade sending Jaylen Brown to the Philadelphia 76ers was not a cost-cutting move and was not made with a follow-up deal in mind, according to a league source. Boston sent the 2024 NBA Finals MVP to Philadelphia on Wednesday in exchange for Paul George, two future first-round picks and two second-round picks. George has two years remaining on his four-year, $211 million contract, one fewer than Brown had remaining. The swap will save the Celtics roughly $2.9 million this season. Despite that savings, a league source stressed the trade was not a financial decision. The source said there was no directive from ownership to move Brown. The same source added that Wednesday's deal was not executed with an imminent secondary trade already planned. Boston's front office reportedly "agonized" over the decision for days before finalizing it.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人，这笔交易继续影响凯尔特人与 76 人的阵容评估。
items.oneLineZh: Jaylen Brown 与 76 人达成 6 年 合同

items.title: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton
items.originalTitle: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton
items.headlineZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers do not currently have any remaining cap space to re-sign Rui Hachimura, with 13 roster spots filled and only veteran minimum contracts available for outside additions. Hachimura earned $18.3 million last season and posted 17.5 points per game on 54.9% shooting, including 56.9% from three-point range, to go with 4.0 rebounds during the playoffs. Hachimura's unsigned status has prompted speculation among league sources about a possible trade or use of the stretch provision that the Lakers could make to free up space involving Jarred Vanderbilt or Deandre Ayton. Vanderbilt is on a $12.43 million expiring contract as he wraps his four-year, $48 million deal. Ayton picked up his $8.1 million option for the 2026-27 season. The Lakers signed Sandro Mamukelashvili to a four-year, $52 million contract and shot 38.9% from three on a career-high 3.7 attempts per game last season, providing similar size and shooting to Hachimura. The San Antonio Spurs had emerged as a possible destination for Hachimura in free agency, but went inandother direction on Wednesday by reaching agreement with Tobias Harris.
items.oneLineZh: Rui Hachimura Could 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Rui Hachimura Could Return If Lakers Clear Jarred Vanderbilt Or Deandre Ayton

items.title: Darko Rajakovic, Raptors Sign Multi-Year Extension
items.originalTitle: Darko Rajakovic, Raptors Sign Multi-Year Extension
items.headlineZh: Darko Rajakovic 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Darko Rajakovic 签约动向更新
items.summary: Darko Rajakovic and the Toronto Raptors have signed a multi-year contract extension. The Raptors returned to the playoffs for the first time under Rajakovic in 2026 and hope to take another step forward following their acquisition of Kawhi Leonard. "Darko's strong development philosophy and commitment to a team-first culture shine through on a daily basis," Bobby Webster said in a statement. "We've seen these qualities play out on the court - our team plays hard, plays together, and fights until the end. Darko knows there's more to be done, and we're looking forward to seeing the continued growth of this team." Rajakovic was hired by the Raptors in 2023 to replace Nick Nurse as head coach. Rajakovic had previously served as assistant coach of the Memphis Grizzlies.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Darko Rajakovic 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。

items.titleZh: Interested 在 Jonathan 相关消息更新
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers have interest in signing Jonathan Kuminga in free agency, sources tell The Athletic. Kuminga is a free agent after the Atlanta Hawks declined their $24.3 million option . Kuminga signed a two-year, $48.5 million deal with the Golden State Warriors last September after a prolonged restricted free agency. In 16 games with the Hawks, Kuminga averaged 12.2 points, 5.3 rebounds and 2.1 assists in 22.1 minutes. Kuminga would fill a need for the Lakers for athleticism on the wing.

items.title: DeMar DeRozan Hoping To Soon Reach Resolution On Exit From Kings
items.originalTitle: DeMar DeRozan Hoping To Soon Reach Resolution On Exit From Kings
items.headlineZh: DeMar DeRozan Hoping 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: DeMar DeRozan Hoping 相关消息更新
items.summary: DeMar DeRozan wants to speed up his departure from the Sacramento Kings, either through a trade or by being waived. DeRozan is owed $25 million for next season, but only $10 million of that is guaranteed. DeRozan expects Sacramento to waive and stretch his contract with rival executives around the league sharing that same expectation. A stretch provision would allow the Kings to spread DeRozan's remaining guaranteed money over multiple seasons, reducing the annual cap hit. DeRozan would also be free to sign elsewhere as an unrestricted free agent. Sacramento has not indicated a firm timeline for a decision on DeRozan's future. But the sides could still explore trade options before any waiver decision is finalized. DeRozan has long been one of the NBA's most durable players. Last season, he averaged 18.4 points, 2.9 rebounds and 4.1 assists in 31.2 minutes across 77 games. DeRozan is represtned by Aaron Goodwin .
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 DeMar DeRozan Hoping 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: DeMar DeRozan Hoping 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: DeMar DeRozan Hoping To Soon Reach Resolution On Exit From Kings

items.title: LeBron James Has No Timetable For Making Free Agency Decision
items.originalTitle: LeBron James Has No Timetable For Making Free Agency Decision
items.headlineZh: LeBron James Has 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: LeBron James Has 签约动向更新
items.summary: LeBron James is taking his time in free agency and has no timetable for when he will make a decision. Because James is showing some level of flexibility for the type of contract he is prepared to sign, he can be patient without necessarily stopping other business around the league from getting done unlike the situations in 2010 and 2014. "LeBron James is not in a rush right now to make a decision," said Shams Charania on Thursday. "He's evaluating everything. His biggest priority in all this is finding a team where he feels he's going to have a chance to play meaningful basketball and compete for a championship. My understanding is this will not be a financially driven, money decision. "His agent, Rich Paul, has been getting about a dozen pitches ever since free agency opened." The Golden State Warriors, Cleveland Cavaliers and Miami Heat are considered the three most probable teams for James. The Denver Nuggets and Philadelphia 76ers have also been identified as teams that have reached out to James. "LeBron James will probably take the next few days to sift through all that and figure out exactly where he's at. There is no timetable," added Charania.
items.oneLineZh: LeBron James Has 签约动向更新
items.displayTitle: LeBron James Has No Timetable For Making Free Agency Decision

Flagler spent the last two years in Oklahoma City.

items.summary: Willie Green is expected to join Dusty May's coaching staff with the Dallas Mavericks, according to Marc Stein of The Stein Line. Green was also pursued by the Warriors. May left Michigan to join the Mavs last month.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，原文聚焦 Willie Green Expected 的最新动态和后续影响。
items.oneLineZh: Willie Green Expected 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Willie Green Expected To Join Mavs Coaching Staff

items.title: Marvin Bagley III, Nuggets Agree To One-Year Deal
items.originalTitle: Marvin Bagley III, Nuggets Agree To One-Year Deal
items.headlineZh: Marvin Bagley III 与掘金达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Marvin Bagley III 与掘金达成一年合同
items.summary: Marvin Bagley III signed a one-year deal with the Denver Nuggets, reported Shams Charania of ESPN. Bagley chose the Nuggets over a "handful" of offers. Bagley averaged 10.5 points and 6.1 rebounds in 60 games for the Wizards and Mavericks last season.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Marvin Bagley III 与掘金达成一年合同，原文关注 Marvin Bagley III 的合同或自由市场动向。
items.oneLineZh: Marvin Bagley III 与掘金达成一年合同
items.displayTitle: Marvin Bagley III 与掘金达成一年合同

items.title: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.originalTitle: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.headlineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.titleZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.summary: The Dallas Mavericks have acquired Santi Aldama from the Memphis Grizzlies for AJ Johnson, a protected 2030 first round pick via the Golden State Warriors and two future second round picks. The Mavericks also acquire the draft rights to Tarik Biberovic. Aldama appeared in 43 games with the Grizzlies last season, averaging 14.0 points, 6.7 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 27.9 minutes. Aldama signed a three-year, $52.5 million deal with the Grizzlies last offseason.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama，送出 AJ Johnson、一个来自勇士的受保护 2030 年首轮签、两个未来次轮签。
items.oneLineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.displayTitle: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
